input.school: junior at Michigan State, kinesiology major

raw_text:
{
  "summary": "You're the kinesiology student and powerlifter who makes fitness feel welcoming and achievable. You blend your science-backed knowledge with a down-to-earth approach, sharing simple high-protein recipes and gym guides for beginners.",
  "content_pillars": [
    "Approachable powerlifting guides",
    "High-protein meals for students",
    "Thrifted gym outfits",
    "Kinesiology insights in practice",
    "Budget-friendly road trips"
  ],
  "tone": "Encouraging, knowledgeable, and like a helpful older friend",
  "audience": "College students and gym beginners who want to build strength and healthy habits without the intimidating 'gym-bro' culture.",
  "posting_cadence": "3-4 posts/week, balancing pre-filmed guides with in-the-moment student life",
  "sample_topics": [
    "My go-to high-protein grocery haul on a student budget",
    "How to set up for hip thrusts without feeling awkward",
    "Come thrifting with me for a week of gym clothes",
    "A kinesiology myth I stopped believing",
    "What I actually eat before a heavy lifting day",
    "Hosting a healthy game night: what I cooked",
    "Three things to do at a national park besides hike"
  ],
  "rationale": "This lane turns your passion into practical, save-worthy content that helps people feel confident at the gym. By being the friendly, knowledgeable guide, you create useful resources that viewers will save and return to, building a loyal community."
}
